panels.title: Active Collectors
panels.description: Number of distinct collectors currently reporting duration metrics.

panels.title: P95 Collection Duration
panels.description: 95th percentile of collector run duration across all selected clusters and collectors.

panels.title: Success Rate
panels.description: Percentage of successful collector runs (total - errors) / total.

targets.expr: ((sum by(collector) (rate(cloudcost_exporter_collector_error{cluster=~"$cluster", collector=~"$collector"}[$__rate_interval])) or (0 * sum by(collector) (rate(cloudcost_exporter_collector_total{cluster=~"$cluster", collector=~"$collector"}[$__rate_interval])))) / sum by(collector) (rate(cloudcost_exporter_collector_total{cluster=~"$cluster", collector=~"$collector"}[$__rate_interval]))) * 100

panels.title: Error Rate by Collector (%)
panels.description: Per-collector error rate over time — errors / total collector runs.

targets.expr: (1 - ((sum by(collector) (rate(cloudcost_exporter_collector_error{cluster=~"$cluster", collector=~"$collector"}[$__rate_interval])) or (0 * sum by(collector) (rate(cloudcost_exporter_collector_total{cluster=~"$cluster", collector=~"$collector"}[$__rate_interval])))) / sum by(collector) (rate(cloudcost_exporter_collector_total{cluster=~"$cluster", collector=~"$collector"}[$__rate_interval])))) * 100

panels.title: Success Rate by Collector (%)
panels.description: Per-collector success rate over time.

panels.title: Collection Rate vs Error Rate
panels.description: Collection attempt rate vs error rate — shows the error share relative to total throughput.

targets.expr: topk without(version) (1, max by(cluster, version) (cloudcost_exporter_build_info)) and on(version) topk(1, count by(version) (max by(cluster, version) (cloudcost_exporter_build_info)))
(topk without(version) (1, max by(cluster, version) (cloudcost_exporter_build_info)) unless on(version) topk(1, count by(version) (max by(cluster, version) (cloudcost_exporter_build_info)))) * 0

panels.title: Version History per Cluster
panels.description: Shows when each version became active per cluster. Transitions indicate upgrade events.

panels.title: P95 Duration — AWS
panels.description: P95 collection duration across AWS collectors.

panels.title: P95 Duration — GCP
panels.description: P95 collection duration across GCP collectors.

panels.title: P95 Duration — Azure
panels.description: P95 collection duration across Azure collectors.

panels.title: Success Rate — AWS
panels.description: Success rate for AWS collectors (errors assumed 0).

panels.title: Success Rate — GCP
panels.description: Success rate for GCP collectors (errors assumed 0).

panels.title: Success Rate — Azure
panels.description: Success rate for Azure collectors (errors assumed 0).

panels.title: Error Log Rate
panels.description: Rate of log lines containing error-level messages from the cloudcost-exporter namespace.

panels.title: Error Logs
panels.description: Log lines at error level from the cloudcost-exporter namespace.

panels.title: All Logs (cloudcost-exporter namespace)
panels.description: All logs from the cloudcost-exporter namespace across selected clusters.

panels.title: P99 Duration by Collector
panels.description: P50, P95, and P99 latency percentiles of collection duration per collector over time.

panels.title: P95 Duration by Collector
panels.description: P95 collection duration trend per collector.

panels.title: P50 Duration by Collector
panels.description: P50 (median) collection duration trend per collector.

panels.title: P95 Duration by Collector (current, ranked)
panels.description: Current P95 collection duration ranked by collector. Identifies the slowest collectors at a glance.

panels.title: P95 Top 10 Slowest Regions
panels.description: P95 collection duration trend over time, broken down by region.

panels.title: P95 Duration — GCP Regions
panels.description: GCP regions identified by naming convention (no hyphen before trailing digit, e.g. europe-west4, us-central1).

panels.title: P95 Duration — AWS Regions
panels.description: AWS regions identified by naming convention (hyphen before trailing digit, e.g. us-east-1, eu-west-2).

panels.title: P95 Duration — Azure Regions
panels.description: Azure regions identified by naming convention (no hyphens, e.g. eastus, westeurope, eastus2).
